title: Google Drive app option for Monday Project Gallery
excerpt: Most of our projects requires our techs to upload a lot of pictures from their onsite work, which we then in turn use for Marketing. It would be great if there is an app  in Monday’s project gallery section, that allows …

posts.author: Nikki_F2B (Nikki Adams)
posts.cookedHtml:
Most of our projects requires our techs to upload a lot of pictures from their onsite work, which we then in turn use for Marketing. It would be great if there is an app in Monday’s project gallery section, that allows you to click and access your drive to upload the media or files directly to your google drive, something similar to when you get an attachment in your email instead of having to download and then upload to google drive. Is there an app in Monday that allows this, is this something maybe Monday can add to their platform if there are no apps or integrations offering this feature? Thanks.

Nikki

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Nikki,

You could give our Google Drive Integration+Sync app a try.

Allows you to set automations, and syncs files directly to your Google Drive.
